title: exacum aphyllum
intro: Exacum aphyllum, also known as the pale blue exacum or mountain blue exacum, is a flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in reducing fever and soothing digestive issues. The plant's health benefits include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its ability to act as a diuretic to help with urinary issues. Exacum aphyllum can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in its raw form in traditional medicine practices.
